titleStmt.title: SII 20.39: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 39. (B.K. No. 23 of 1936-37.) DĒVŪR, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the ceiling at the main entrance into the Rāmēśvara temple.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 986, Krōdhi, Pushya, śu. 13, Friday, Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti corresponding regularly to A.D. 1064, December 24.

The record registers a gift of 60 mattars of land to god Mārasiṁgēśvara of Dēvapura, for worship and for the benefit of ascetics and students, by Mahāsāmanta (Vā)rarasa who obtained the gift-land from Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Trailōkyamalla-Noḷambapallavapermānaḍi-Jayasiṅgadēva who was governing at Taldavāḍi-nāḍu. The gift was entrusted to Jñānārāśi-paṇḍita of pāśupata school.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ
mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ paramabha
ṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷu
kyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattraiḷōkyamalladēvara vija
yarājyābhyudayamuttarōttarābhivri
ddhipravardhdhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ kalyā
ṇada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasankathāvinō
dadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire svasti samadhigatapaṁ
camahāśabda mahāpallavānvaya śrīpṛ
thvīvallabhamahārājādhirājaparamēśvaraṁ
kāṁcīpuravarēśvaraṁ pratyakṣacāṇākyanamōghavākyaṁ śrī
mattraiḷōkyamallanoḷaṁbapallavapermmāna
ḍi jayasiṁgadēvar taḻdavāḍināḍoḷ su
khadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire tatpādōpajīvi
svasti samastaguṇasampannaṁ nuḍidu ma
ttennaṁ pratipannamaṁdaraṁ bhōgapuraṁdaraṁ bhri
tyacintāmaṇi vīrasikhāmaṇi Aritaṭṭe ka
ṇṭhīravaṁ samaraikabhairavaṁ mēḷamāṇi
kyānēkavākya paranārīputra jayalakṣmī
nivāsa kīrttiviḷāsanabhinava vikramāditya
pagevarāditya śrīmattraiḷōkyamallanoḷaṁ
bapallavapermmānaḍi jayasiṁgadēvapādā
rādhakaṁ parabaḷasādhakaṁ siṁgidēvanaṁka
surigekavacavarṣa nāmādisamasta
prasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāsāmantaṁ
vārarasar śrīmattraiḷōkyamallanoḷaṁba
pallavapermmānaḍi jayasiṁgadēvaralli sa
rvvanamaśyamāge paḍedu sakanṛpakālātītasa
taṁgaḷ 986 neya krōdhi saṁvatsarada tadvarṣābhya
ntarada puṣya su 12 sukravāramuttarāya
ṇa sankrāntiyaṁdu svasti yamaniyamāsa
naprāṇāyāmapratyāhāradhyānadhāraṇa
japasamādhisaṁpanna pāśupatayōgācā
ryya śrīmat jñānarāśipaṇḍitargge kālaṁ ka
rcci dhārāpūrvvakadiṁ dēvapurada śrī mā
rasiṁgēśvaradēvargge tapōdhanargge chātrargga
maśanāchādanakke Āvūra polada pa
ścima digbhāgadoḷ Agrahāraṁ karṇṇava
ḷḷiya khara bhūmige naḍeva hiriya gaḍiṁ
bada kōloḷ biṭṭa matta 60 Ī dharmmamanā
rorvvar kādu nōḻpavaradē dharmmaṁ Aḷipi negaḻda
vargge kurukṣētradoḷu vāraṇāsiyoḷu ka
vileyu brāhmaṇaruma liṁgaṅgaḷumana
ḷida dōṣamakku Ante Alte dharmma ślōka .
sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmaśēturnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kāḷē
pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ śarvvānētānbhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁ
drāṁnbhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . bahu
bhirvvasudhā bhuktā rājabhissagarādhibhiḥ yasya
yasya yadā bhūmi tasya tasya tadā phalaṁ .
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharā ṣaṣṭirvva
riṣa sahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 20.39 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
